name: BudgetReadCapabilityDescriptor
description: Versioned read-only consumer view that reuses exact BUDGET and public LEDGER DTOs, preserves explicit plan-absence states, binds one coherent analytical evidence result, and cannot grant plan mutation.
schema_def: - result BudgetInsightEvidence: {planState: BoundRevision|NoBudgetPlan|NoActiveBudgetPlanRevision, planRevisionDetail?, budgetPosition?, datedActualMembers[], ledgerBudgetActualTotal, ledgerSnapshotId, ledgerStoreGenerationFingerprint, ledgerContractVersion, categoryContractVersion, calculationSchemaVersion?, evidenceBindingFingerprint}

- BoundRevision invariants: one immutable revision; one released LEDGER actuals query supplies the complete member set; the canonical BudgetPositionCalculator and datedActualMembers consume that same set; BudgetPosition provenance equals member-set provenance; planRevisionDetail, budgetPosition, and calculationSchemaVersion are present

- NoBudgetPlan and NoActiveBudgetPlanRevision invariants: planRevisionDetail, budgetPosition, and calculationSchemaVersion are absent; the one complete LEDGER member set and exact ledgerBudgetActualTotal remain present; every member appears exactly once and their checked exact sum equals ledgerBudgetActualTotal; no empty or zero plan, revision, position, or NotFound is fabricated; BudgetPositionCalculator is not invoked
- every member includes stable transaction identity, Effective Date, exact signed Budget Actual, current category identity or Uncategorized, and required lifecycle provenance
- over-limit, incompatible, incomplete, stale, or unprovable binding returns a stable failure before partial output

Constraints: no budget.plan.draft.create, budget.plan.revision.activate, mutation handler, idempotency key, private storage, second INSIGHTS-led LEDGER query, duplicate position calculation, authority grant, analytics field, transport implementation, report persistence, or consumer state. Unsupported versions fail before financial processing.
